title: post api render with sufficient points
description: Test the POST /api/render endpoint with a user having sufficient points. Verify that the render request is accepted, points are deducted, a job_id and signed_upload_url are returned, and the rendering workflow completes successfully with a final image URL.

title: post api render with insufficient points
description: Test the POST /api/render endpoint with a user having insufficient points. Verify that the request is rejected with a 402 status and an insufficient_credits error.

title: get api user with existing user
description: Test the GET /api/user endpoint with an existing user email and valid X-User-Email header. Verify that the response returns 200 with user points, lifetime points, referral code, and inviter id.

title: get api user with new user registration
description: Test the GET /api/user endpoint with a new user email and valid X-User-Email header. Verify that the user is automatically registered, and the response returns 201 with default points and account details.

title: get api user missing x user email header
description: Test the GET /api/user endpoint without the X-User-Email header. Verify that the response returns 400 with a missing_header error.

title: post api webhook with valid signature and new event
description: Test the POST /api/webhook endpoint with a valid HMAC signature and a new payment event. Verify that the event is processed, points are credited to the user based on variant_id, the transaction is recorded, and a 200 acknowledgment is returned.

title: post api webhook with invalid signature
description: Test the POST /api/webhook endpoint with an invalid HMAC signature. Verify that the request is rejected with a 401 signature_invalid error.

title: post api webhook with duplicate event id
description: Test the POST /api/webhook endpoint with a valid signature but a duplicate event id that has already been processed. Verify that the request is idempotently handled and a 200 no-op response is returned.

title: get api stats health check
description: Test GET /api/stats returns code=0, hours_saved >= 89919, and stats object with total_users and total_points_issued.

title: marketing page email correctness
description: Verify the marketing page HTML does not contain old placeholder 'support@loamlab.studio' and contains new Gmail address 'loamlabstudio@gmail.com' at least 7 times.

title: faq new user credits 60
description: Verify the marketing page FAQ contains correct 60-credit new user bonus text in English, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese.

title: faq 4k credits 30
description: Verify the marketing page FAQ shows 4K costs 30 credits (not the old 25) in all three languages, and the old wrong value is absent.

title: tos section collapsed by default
description: Verify the Terms of Service section (id=terms-body) has max-height:0 inline style on page load, confirming it renders collapsed by default.

title: privacy section collapsed by default
description: Verify the Privacy Policy section (id=privacy-body) has max-height:0 inline style on page load, confirming it renders collapsed by default.
